items.label: Assessment
items.value: The requirement to validate the recovery campaign triggers (email/SMS/push) is not supported by the provided evidence. While the linked use case outlines the need for these triggers, there is no concrete evidence demonstrating their implementation or validation. The prior step evidence does not include any checks or signals related to recovery campaign triggers, leading to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement's coverage.
